name: UBA : Browsed to Information Technology Website
notes:
A user has accessed a URL which may indicate elevated security or legal risk.

References: 
    http://sitereview.bluecoat.com/categories.jsp
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%information technology%' or "Web Category" ilike '%P2P%' or "Web Category" ilike '%peer-to-peer%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Content Server%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Information Security%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Dynamic DNS Host%' or "Web Category" ilike '%File Storage%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Technology/Internet%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Content Delivery Network%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Machine Identifier and Internet%' or "Web Category" ilike'% Internet Portal%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Online Storage and Backup%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Shareware%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Freeware%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Machine Identifier security%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Computers and the Internet%' or "Web Category" ilike '%File transfer service%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Online storage%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Technical Information%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Internet Service Full Name Full Name%' or "Web Category" ilike '%Computing/Internet%' OR "Web Category" in (9, 28, 78, 99, 113, 115, 116, 138, 146, 147, 148, 149, 150, 151, 152, 153, 156, 191, 212, 221, 227) AQL filter query
